user.title: Microsoft Teams Presence
user.description: Sign in with your Microsoft 365 account to enable Teams presence tracking.

error.still_waiting: Still waiting for sign-in. Please complete sign-in in your browser and click Submit again.

abort.already_configured: This Microsoft 365 account is already configured.
abort.device_flow_failed: Could not contact Microsoft to start sign-in. Check your internet connection.
abort.auth_failed: Sign-in failed or timed out. Please try again.
